reviews.comment:

Excellent place, clean and with good prices. Everyone was very friendly and helpful; my wife Lana and I were delighted!

reviews.comment:
Si vas para Entre Ríos y no queres traerte un regalo de los hdp de los polis de radares moviles, respeta 120, 100, 80, 60 y 40; en esa zona aunque creas que no es necesario. caso contrario pone tu vista 1 km adelante y si ves auto o camionetita blanca y celeste baja tu veloc a 80 km/h. No perdonan 2km de diferencia  aunque no puedas bajar de 100 a 80 en tan poco espacio

(Translated by Google)
If you're heading to Entre Ríos and don't want to get a ticket from those damn cops with their mobile speed cameras, respect the 120, 100, 80, 60, and 40 km/h speed limits in that area, even if you think it's unnecessary. Otherwise, keep your eyes on the road about a kilometer ahead, and if you see a car or a small white and light blue pickup truck, reduce your speed to 80 km/h. They won't forgive a 2 km/h difference, even if you can't go from 100 to 80 in such a short distance.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5d3BpWmlBRRAB
